nodes.context: Colombian guerrilla group involved in the Colombian conflict.
Lebanese militant group and political party, investigated for drug trafficking and terrorist financing.
Pakistan-based terror outfit involved in the 2008 Mumbai attacks.

edges.evidence_quote: the Special Jurisdiction for Peace found that the DEA had plotted with Colombian Attorney General Néstor Humberto Martínez to fabricate drug trafficking charges against Jesús Santrich, in a bid to jeopardize the peace agreement by inciting the FARC to take up arms again.
edges.context: The DEA allegedly plotted to fabricate charges against a FARC member to incite the group to resume hostilities.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2008 the Special Operations part of the agency launched a multi-agency effort named Project Cassandra to investigate Hezbollah for allegations of illicit drug trafficking and terrorist financing.
edges.context: The DEA investigated Hezbollah for drug trafficking and terrorist financing.

edges.evidence_quote: Headley, while working with the DEA, took part in the plot by providing reconnaissance to the Pakistan based terror outfit Lashkar-e-Taiba
edges.context: A DEA informant provided reconnaissance to Lashkar-e-Taiba for terror attacks.
